description: Speakers in different timezones negotiate a meeting time. Alice is EST, Carol is PST. Initial 10 AM EST / 7 AM PST rejected, settled on noon EST / 9 AM PST. Event stored in Alice's (owner's) local time.

events.title: Partnership Proposal Call
events.reasoning: After timezone negotiation between Alice (EST) and Carol (PST), they settle on noon EST / 9 AM PST on Monday. The event is stored in Alice's (the owner's) local time: noon EST = 12:00.
events.assumptions: Duration assumed 1 hour per Alice's 'like an hour'. Time stored in owner's (Alice's) local timezone EST: noon = 12:00. Monday = 2026-02-23.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: partnership proposal call on Monday at noon EST (9 AM PST for Carol) with Alice and Carol.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Monday = 2026-02-23. Critical: store time in owner's (Alice's) local timezone. Rejected time: 10 AM EST / 7 AM PST. Confirmed time: noon EST / 9 AM PST = 12:00:00 for Alice's calendar.
